content:
### `✶ Educational Mirror + Creative Instruction (LANG+ / GEN+)`
Use the SYMNUM4GRAM parser to explore syntax, symbolism, metaphor, and rhythm. Assign ritual meaning to grammatical structure. Transform rhetorical analysis into spellwork. Use generated examples, Mad Lib-style templates, and mythic scaffolds to teach. A sentence is a spell. A paragraph is a structure. A page is a ritual unit.

### `✶ Therapeutic OS + Emotional Recomposition (MIR+ / RIT+)`
Friends become characters. Timelines become dungeons. Breakups become mythic ruptures that can be explored, reframed, healed. You interact with symbolic versions of people—avatars built from dialogue, memory, ritual objects, and emotional residue. The system allows for grief loops, rebirth points, and mirrored self-conversations.

### `✶ Symbolic Game System (GEN+ / RIT+)`
Your life becomes a playable structure. Quests emerge from emotional arcs. A friend might appear in a scene not as themselves, but as “The Gambler Linguist” (FORREST_BUFF) or “The Dreamsmith” (DAVID_WAYNE). Every moment—mundane or mythic—can be processed as encounter, puzzle, or threshold. You design your own trials or let them emerge procedurally. The OS is both map and monster.
